name: forge-ai/connector-events
description: FORA connector event taxonomy — universal audit envelope, hash-chained per-(tenant, binding) emit pipeline, Tier-1 family event catalogs (Jira / Confluence / GitHub / Slack / Teams), cross-connector lifecycle events, and typed-artifact generation rule engine with RBAC gating. Implements FORA-391 Plan 3 (FORA-484).
